prose.en: Agencies MUST notify FedRAMP after requesting any additional information or materials from a FedRAMP Certified cloud service offering beyond those required by FedRAMP.

notification.name: [For Agencies] Additional Information, Security Requirements, or Certification Change, or After Request Form

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: Agencies are expected to notify FedRAMP under OMB Memorandum M-24-15 section IV (a).
